MATTER CONTESTED, ARGUMENT IS HELD, AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joel Hugo Siegal, Esq., of Siegal & Richardson LLP, Tel. 510.271.6720, appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Frank Merritt;
Margaret Schroeder, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3843, appearing in person for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant the City and County of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Court Reporter: Bailiff: Park. (301/RCE)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
